1289416: Inflicts 34,219 Nature damage and an additional 23,877 Nature damage every 1 sec for 8 sec.
1294557: Inflicts 64,131 Physical damage and reduces haste by 30% for 6 sec. This effect ignores armor.
1294567:
The Twinfang spits numbing venom at players, inflicting 66,356 Nature damage on impact and an additional 23,663 Nature damage every 1 sec for 20 sec.

Affected players become paralyzed over time, reducing their movement speed by 10% with each tick.
1294845: The writhe injects the target with powerful venom, increasing damage taken by 20% for 12 sec.
1294849: The writhe rattles its tail, inflicting Physical damage every 1 sec for 5 sec. This effect ignores armor.
1294934: Caster launches a rapid stream of venom, inflicting 26,157 Nature damage every 1 sec to enemies in a cone in front of them for 5 sec.
1295055: The serpent spins violently, inflicting Nature damage.
1296058: Rav'i hurls 3 waves of stomach acid in lines toward an enemy, inflicting Nature damage to enemies caught in the waves and decreasing their movement speed by 50% and their damage done by 50%.
1296220: Rav'i shoots globs of venom at 3 enemies that each inflict 68,121 Nature damage and an additional 17,105 Nature damage to enemies within 5 yd every 1 sec for 10 sec.
1298949: The Writhing Coil slices their current target with a bladed tail, inflicting 67,011 Physical damage.
1299053: Every snake within the Writhing Coil unleashes a relentless rattle, inflicting 40,209 Physical damage every 1 sec. This effect stacks, and increases its applications every 1 sec.
1299130: The Writhing Coil burrows across the ground, inflicting Nature damage to enemies in its path.
1299154: The Writhing Coil shoots venom at all enemies, inflicting 22,617 Nature damage and an additional 22,617 Nature damage every 1 sec for 15 sec.
1299940: The Writhing Coil directs a sequence of vicious attacks at an enemy.
1300044: The Writhing Coil unleashes a spray of venom at an enemy, inflicting 239,262 Nature damage to enemies in a cone in front of them.
1300876:
Zul'jan briefly wields the Fang of Ula'tek as snake heads focus ancient beams into him for 10 sec, granting Fang Empowered.

Upon interception by players, the beams instead inflict 29,934 Nature damage every 1 sec and apply Ritual Venom.
1301111: Zul'jan unleashes spinning axes that ricochet through the arena and eviscerate players on contact, inflicting 39,066 Physical damage every 0.25 sec.
1301350: Zul'jan hacks twice at his current target, inflicting 80,416 Physical damage with each strike.
1301413: Zul'jan hurls an axe at a player, inflicting 24,400 Physical damage to all players caught in its path and an additional 24,400 Physical damage every 1 sec for 9 sec.
1306308: Melee swings increase attack speed by 20% for 2 sec. This effect stacks.
1306517: The Ritual Chieftain invokes spirits of the altar to gut players, inflicting 56,203 Physical damage and causing the next healing to be absorbed.
1306668: The Twinfang unleashes noxious gas from its jaws, inflicting 35,895 Nature damage every 0.5 sec to players caught within its breath.
1306911: The chieftain hacks his current target, inflicting 64,119 Physical damage.
1307567: Inflicts 34,219 Nature damage and an additional 23,877 Nature damage every 1 sec for 8 sec.
1307894:
Rav'i stomps impatiently, sending a quake through the temple that inflicts 85,526 Nature damage to all enemies and breaks several stalactites from the ceiling. Each stalactite inflicts 13,904 Nature damage to all enemies within 5 yards of the impact.

Flying Twinfangs are skewered by the falling rocks, dropping Fresh Meat into Rav'i's pit.
1308518: Teleports behind a player and slashes them, inflicting 18,292 Nature damage and an additional 18,292 Nature damage every 1 sec for 6 sec.
1308865: The serpent infests players with eggs, inflicting Nature damage every 1 sec for 6 sec. Upon expiration, the infestations burst into Hatchlings.
